mapper.select: SELECT session_started_at AS sessionStartedAt, collected_at AS collectedAt, autovacuum, session_phase AS sessionPhase, heap_blks_total AS heapBlksTotal, tuples_deleted AS tuplesDeleted, tuples_dead_but_not_removable AS tuplesDeadButNotRemovable, n_dead_tup AS nDeadTup, n_live_tup AS nLiveTup, relsize_total_bytes AS relsizeTotalBytes, elapsed_seconds AS elapsedSeconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT collected_at AS collectedAt, heap_blks_scanned AS heapBlksScanned, heap_blks_vacuumed AS heapBlksVacuumed, tuples_deleted AS tuplesDeleted, elapsed_seconds AS elapsedSeconds FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY table_name ASC
